---
name: unit-test
description: Use when writing or reviewing unit tests for Next.js TypeScript code, Python modules, coverage for changed behavior, fixtures, mocks, edge cases, and deterministic verification of small components.
---

# Unit Test

Use this skill whenever behavior changes at the function, class, or module level.

Focus on:

- happy path and edge cases
- failure handling
- deterministic fixtures and mocks
- direct mapping between changed behavior and test coverage
- unit tests for TypeScript route or component helpers and Python service or worker helpers where applicable

Unit tests should prove the smallest meaningful behavior without requiring the full system to run.
